message:
refactor(indexer): use storage.database_path() with error context; cargo fmt cleanup

Two small cleanups in the lexical-rebuild path that landed
together because they're noise that would otherwise contaminate
diffs of the surrounding parallelism work.

src/indexer/mod.rs
  - Replaced `storage.db_path().to_path_buf()` with
    `storage.database_path()` followed by `.with_context(|| …)?`
    to plumb the actual error up to the caller when the database
    path cannot be resolved (the prior call assumed infallibility,
    which is no longer accurate after a recent FrankenStorage
    refactor that made path resolution fallible).

  - Removed an unused `mut` qualifier on
    `batch_messages_by_conversation`; the value is now passed
    by-move into `prepare_lexical_rebuild_batch` which owns the
    final mutation.

  - Otherwise pure `cargo fmt` reflow of long-line method-chain
    expressions and closure bodies.

src/search/tantivy.rs
  Pure `cargo fmt` reflow of one over-long
  `normalized_index_source_id(...)` call into a let-binding plus
  call expression on its own line.  No behaviour change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
